{{Quote|You're tough and nasty, I'll give you that. But so am I.|Glaive to Durge|<ref name="SWR" />}}
'''Glaive''' was a muscular, bald, tall [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] dutifully during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Serving as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Glaive fought bravely until his death on [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Biography==
Brought to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] after being identified as [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Glaive was elevated to the rank of Master following years of independent study and training. After this he selected the young, temperamental [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Zule Xiss]] to become his apprentice.<ref name="SWR" />

[[File:GlaiveBattleDroid.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Glaive destroys a battle droid on Ohma-D'un.]]
When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Glaive and Padawan Xiss reported to Coruscant to receive orders from the High Council. Appointed the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the newly formed [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Glaive and his Padawan led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the Confederacy's [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid horde]]. Early into the conflict, the Master-Padawan pair was assigned to team up with Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in investigating the mysterious communications blackout on the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] colony moon, [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]]. Arriving on the moon, the Jedi discovered that a toxic bioweapon had been released on the moon's population and all of the Gungan's wiped out. As they investigated the corpses, the Jedi were ambushed by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]]. Engaging the two Separatist [[Commander/Legends|Commanders]], Glaive began to break out in blisters caused from the toxic gases still in the atmosphere. Fighting fiercely against Durge and preventing the death of his Padawan, Glaive was caught off guard by Ventress, who [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] him with her crimson-bladed lightsaber. Durge bid him a sadistic farewell: "May [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] be with you, [[Meatbag/Legends|meatbag]]."<ref name="SWR" />

==Personality and traits==
Headstrong and arrogant, Master Glaive was not prone to making friends among his more stoic and meditative colleagues, as demonstrated by his almost antagonistic relationship with fellow Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Brutish and intimidating in appearance, Glaive wore a slightly modified [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi tunic]], preferring a sleeveless leather tunic and heavy [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]].<ref name="SWR" />
